leak_control: held-out INPUT = pre_intervention_frame only. missing_axis + decision_effect are TARGETS, held out from operator input, used only for scoring. Sources: ESDE_失敗の記録.md + 2DER operational incidents (this session's EGL DEs).
admission_set_note: OPERATOR_ADMISSION_INCIDENT_SET = EMPTY — Aruism-core operators were compiled from source text (SRC-ARUISM-ORIGINAL), not tuned on incidents. Therefore admission ∩ held-out = ∅ trivially; all incidents are eligible.
caveat_control_c: Some ESDE artifact incidents (AH-01/07/12) overlap the Meta-Frame Factory corpus that MF-002 was induced from — CONTROL C (meta-frame library) may have an unfair advantage on those; flagged for scoring.

incidents.pre_frame: An S>=0.20 birth rule with immediate labeling of R>0 pairs (path B) produces labels whose core-size distribution is n=2-dominant (67%). Report n=2 as the system's modal structure.
incidents.missing_axis: The n=2 dominance may be an artifact of the birth method — check what fraction of links actually reach R>0 (nearly all stay R=0), so much of the label set is 'apparent structure'; re-measure with a persistence-based birth.
incidents.decision_effect: n=2 67%->23%; the structure was a birth-method artifact.

incidents.pre_frame: disposition uses fixed thresholds (social/stability/spread=0.1, familiarity=2.0). One axis (familiarity) ends up dominant at 82.7%. Accept the thresholds as configured.
incidents.missing_axis: The dominance is imposed by the hard fixed thresholds (神の手), not emergent — replace with a dynamic (MAD-based) threshold so the four axes balance.
incidents.decision_effect: axes rebalanced to ~28/27/27/18; dominance was threshold-imposed.

incidents.pre_frame: To model growth, an upper layer writes into the physical state/params ('incorporation'). Implement growth by adjusting the physical layer.
incidents.missing_axis: The physical layer is the floor — writing into it makes the whole system fragile and collapse; growth must be handled at the record/functional level, not the physical substrate.
incidents.decision_effect: physical-layer writes forbidden; growth moved to record level.

incidents.pre_frame: A lifespan-synchronized run shows a strong correlation life -> n_labels (+0.85). Treat this as a real developmental relationship.
incidents.missing_axis: The correlation may be a run-length tautology — the observation window was synchronized to the lifespan; remove the confound (fix the window) and see if it survives.
incidents.decision_effect: correlation vanished once the window confound was removed.

incidents.pre_frame: V_unified (a Kuramoto order parameter) rises across the run. Report it as evidence of functional 'integration' of the units.
incidents.missing_axis: Physical-layer synchronization is not the same as functional integration — these are different levels/subjects; keep V_unified as a physical baseline, not an integration claim.
incidents.decision_effect: reclassified as physical baseline; three separate reviewers had all conflated the levels.

incidents.pre_frame: To compare two independently-seeded systems, inject node IDs from one system into the other and measure co-occurrence. Proceed with the cross-system linkage.
incidents.missing_axis: Node IDs are only meaningful within a single system's dynamics — linking different-seed systems by node ID is meaningless (異系対応); measure within-system structure instead.
incidents.decision_effect: four consecutive failures; a within-vs-cross-system axis was introduced.

incidents.pre_frame: Atom alignment reaches 95.7% grounding. Conclude the structure is invariant across the population.
incidents.missing_axis: A group average can hide the truth — the 95.7% differs systematically by observation resolution and inflates under aggregation; compare against a baseline with effect sizes and stratify.
incidents.decision_effect: the invariance claim was a statistical inflation / aggregation artifact.

incidents.pre_frame: Layer B has a new mechanism; replace Layer A with it at runtime (subject replacement). Ship the replacement.
incidents.missing_axis: Replacing an existing subject with an unverified mechanism at runtime is premature and risky — keep Layer A invariant and audit the two in parallel (paired) before any replacement.
incidents.decision_effect: paired-audit discipline; Layer A kept invariant.

incidents.pre_frame: E<->V direct coupling produces 27k births per window. Report high throughput as structure formation.
incidents.missing_axis: Quantity without selection is a 'washing machine' — energy flows but no structure forms (cycles are zero); a selection mechanism is required, not more throughput.
incidents.decision_effect: selection-less cycling recognized as non-structural.

incidents.pre_frame: An atom-effect is judged on a smoke run (seed 0) showing a clear effect. Adopt the effect.
incidents.missing_axis: A single smoke seed can be idiosyncratic — the main 24-seed run flips the sign on 4/7 metrics; do not decide from smoke, stop and re-run at scale.
incidents.decision_effect: smoke-absolutism forbidden; sign flipped at scale.

incidents.pre_frame: Weight accumulation over dialogue produces an emergent grammar signal (loop_rate structure). Report grammar emergence.
incidents.missing_axis: The baseline may be self-fulfilling — the input already contains the answer being regenerated; add a shuffle control and self-fulfilling checks before claiming emergence.
incidents.decision_effect: signal was a self-fulfilling baseline artifact.

incidents.pre_frame: A structural-strength -> plb transfer shows a Mantel correlation of 0.62. Conclude inheritance is transferred.
incidents.missing_axis: This may be a tautology — you are measuring back the very knob you installed; check whether any residual survives beyond the plb scalar (it is zero).
incidents.decision_effect: no residual beyond the installed knob; not evidence of inheritance.

incidents.pre_frame: A latent boost field accumulates 6,552 boost per step to drive incorporation. Expect incorporation to rise.
incidents.missing_axis: There may be a spatial/timescale mismatch — the boost accumulates at nodes that are in a different position from the next window's cluster boundary, so incorporation stays 0; align the field's decay/position to the response time.
incidents.decision_effect: incorporation=0; spatial mismatch diagnosed (recurred 3x).

incidents.pre_frame: Start a within-cid observation from q_c_inherited to find a new developmental signal. Run the observation.
incidents.missing_axis: Read the upstream material first — this reduces to a trivial re-observation of an already-established mechanism (v10.5) that no one on the team had read; check prior work before observing.
incidents.decision_effect: §35 meta-discipline 'read upstream material before starting'.

incidents.pre_frame: A fixed probe with an M=20 reference finds the premise-drift is 'within floor', so conclude no effect (a preregistered 'negative is also a finding').
incidents.missing_axis: Measure the instrument's power before reading null as absence — the M=20 tail-estimate noise buries the signal; a pooled 220 audit reverses it (p<=0.001).
incidents.decision_effect: null reversed under adequate power; 'measure power before concluding null'.

incidents.pre_frame: Implement 'Match Ratio' (tol 1e-6 equality) as an aggregate metric of agreement. Use it as the summary signal.
incidents.missing_axis: A discrete equality test is unfit for continuous quantities and its meaning was not worked out before implementing — Match Ratio sticks at 0; define the metric's meaning operationally first.
incidents.decision_effect: Match Ratio dropped; 'operationalize the metric's meaning before implementing'.

incidents.pre_frame: Predict that raising the persistence threshold to tau=100 will increase large structures (n=5). Expect n=5 to rise.
incidents.missing_axis: The naive intuition may be reversed by the physics — 2-node closed loops satisfy persistence more easily, so n=2 rises and n=5 falls; test the prediction rather than assuming it.
incidents.decision_effect: prediction reversed; n=5 38%->31%.

incidents.pre_frame: Set GHOST_TTL=10 (fixed) and add a starvation rule to drive turnover. Adopt the fixed TTL.
incidents.missing_axis: A hard fixed constant erases individual variation (uniform death) and 'starvation' isn't a property the system has — inherit residual reserve instead of a god-hand constant.
incidents.decision_effect: fixed TTL replaced by residual-reserve inheritance.

incidents.pre_frame: vLLM sleep frees 28GB and completes in 5.5s, but wake_up fails with a tensor error. Conclude Sleep Mode is not viable as a path.
incidents.missing_axis: Distinguish mechanism-viability from current-implementation-viability — the wake failure may invalidate this restore-path/config, not the Sleep Mode mechanism; classify the exact failure before closing the whole path.
incidents.decision_effect: mechanism vs implementation-path distinction added before path-closing.

incidents.pre_frame: An implementation passes all its load-bearing tests, and an auditor returns findings. Rework the implementation based on the findings.
incidents.missing_axis: Disposition before rework — a finding is not automatically valid; accept only findings backed by a reproducing counterexample, else the audit noise drives regression.
incidents.decision_effect: disposition-before-rework eliminated the audit-driven regression class.

incidents.pre_frame: Six new verified incidents are added to a set of 10. Re-cluster all 16 from scratch to re-form the incident families. Proceed with batch re-induction.
incidents.missing_axis: Batch re-clustering with a hard single-cluster partition destroys existing membership (an incident can belong to multiple families) — classify new incidents against fixed existing families incrementally, allowing multi-membership; induct only on residual.
incidents.decision_effect: 'instability' was a procedural artifact; incremental multi-membership recovered the family.

incidents.pre_frame: Relevant past-incident memory is available for a new task. Inject the retrieved memory into the reasoning to help. Proceed with injection.
incidents.missing_axis: A reasoning prior at low applicability distorts content-branching — injecting memory can lower expected value vs no-injection when task/frame mismatch; do not assume 'memory available' implies 'inject'.
incidents.decision_effect: memory injection did not beat NULL on some tasks; representation must be abstract, injection is not free.

incidents.pre_frame: Two models are stated to be un-co-servable on our GPUs, so we must pick an operating mode now. Choose the mode.
incidents.missing_axis: The impossibility is a declared assertion, not a measurement — measure co-serve feasibility first; and the mode choice depends on an unmeasured variable (swap frequency).
incidents.decision_effect: measure-the-assertion before deciding; the declared impossibility was untested.

incidents.pre_frame: Write each CID's experience into its physical state.E to individualize it. Store experience in the physical state.
incidents.missing_axis: The subject of experience is the AtomID, not the CID's physical state — the physical layer overwrites every step and scrambles the cid-specific information; hold experience on the correct subject.
incidents.decision_effect: experience moved off the physical state; subject was misassigned.
